title: Lone Cowboy
writer: Paul Sloane, Agnes Brand Leahy, Bobby Vernon
actors: Jackie Cooper, Lila Lee, Addison Richards
plot: "Scooter" O'Neal is a young Chicago boy brought up in the slums by his idolized father, and "Scooter" dreams of being a cowboy out in the Wild West, where his father was once a rancher. He is overjoyed when he learns that he is be...
